description.stringValue: Premium rich fudge made of fine gram flour, rich cashew meal, sugar, and generous amounts of pure desi ghee. Unmatched richness.
Moist, soft, granular milk cake flavored with cardamom, cooked with freshly curdled paneer and milk solids.
Tiny, spongy cottage cheese grape-sized balls (angoor) floating in a rich, thick, cardamom-infused sweetened condensed milk (rabdi).
Unique combination of rich cocoa and traditional milk fudge, rolled into smooth round pedas that kids and adults love alike.
Traditional Bengali sweet made from fresh paneer (chenna), cooked in sugar syrup, shaped oval, and coated with desiccated coconut.
Thickened milk solid fudge flavored with rich Kashmiri saffron (kesar) and topped with a slice of pistachio. Perfect for festivals.
Rich, creamy strained yogurt dessert (Shrikhand) loaded with mixed dry fruits, chocolate chips, and American nuts.
Healthy sugar-free barfi prepared with premium dates, almonds, cashews, and pistachios bound together with pure desi ghee.
Flattened spongy cottage cheese patties soaked in thickened, sweet saffron milk, garnished with almonds and pistachios.
Traditional sweet made of chickpea flour, sugar, and pure ghee. Soft, porous, and crumbles in your mouth.
Deep-fried milk solids dumplings, fried to a deep dark color, offering a firm outer layer and soft interior soaked in cardamom sugar syrup.
Slow-roasted gram flour (besan) combined with sugar, pure desi ghee, and crunchy almond slivers, rolled into aromatic delicious balls.
Classic milk fudge barfi cooked with fresh mawa/khoya, sweetened to perfection, and garnished with cardamom powder.
